title: The Mighty McGurk
writer: William R. Lipman, Grant Garett, Harry Clork
actors: Wallace Beery, Dean Stockwell, Edward Arnold
plot: "Slag" McGurk, a former boxing champ living on memories of glories past, spends his days and nights as a bouncer/braggert/boozer at Glenson's saloon. But when "Slag" stumbles upon a young orphaned lad and agrees to help him find a...
